title: B2C Premium — Courses & Resources
content:
Overview


The Courses section is the core of the Premium experience. My Courses shows enrolled courses with six resource types. All Courses lets users browse and enroll in 30+ courses across multiple subjects.



My Courses Page


Displays all courses the user has enrolled in. Each course appears as a card with the course name. Clicking a card opens the Course Detail view with six resource types:


  • Textbook: Comprehensive study material organized by chapters with full content coverage
  • Examination Quiz: Full-length practice exams simulating real exam conditions. Users can select from up to 100 quizzes, each with 50 questions and a 90-minute time limit. A quiz grid lets users pick any quiz by number
  • Topic Quiz: Shorter quizzes focused on specific topics within the course
  • Flashcards: Interactive digital flashcards for key concepts and terminology
  • Video Lessons: Video tutorials and explanations for the subject matter
  • Past Questions & Answers: Previous exam questions with detailed solutions and explanations

Each resource opens within the course detail page. A Back to My Courses button returns to the full course list. The course description is displayed at the top of the detail view.



All Courses Page


Displays every available self-study course on the platform. Key features:


  • Search bar: Filter courses by name as you type
  • Course count: Shows total number of available courses (40+)

Each course card shows the course name, a detailed description of topics covered, and an Enroll Now button. Clicking Enroll Now adds the course to My Courses.


Available subjects:


  • Physics (8 courses): AP Physics 1, AP Physics 2, AP Physics C (Mechanics), AP Physics C (E&M), Physics Grades 9–12
  • Mathematics (6 courses): Algebra 1 & 2, Geometry, Pre-Calculus, AP Calculus AB & BC
  • Chemistry (3 courses): Chemistry Grades 10–12
  • Biology (7 courses): Biology Grades 9–12, AP Biology, Biology I & II (College)
  • Economics (6 courses): High School Economics, AP Macroeconomics, AP Microeconomics, Macroeconomics First Year, International Trade and Finance, International Economics
  • Test Preparation: SAT Preparation covering Reading & Writing and Math

Some courses may show "Coming Soon" with a disabled enroll button if they are not yet available.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Click any enrolled course to see all six resource types — textbook, quizzes, flashcards, videos, and past questions."
  • "Examination Quizzes simulate real exams with up to 100 quizzes per course, 50 questions each."
  • "Browse All Courses to discover new subjects — over 40 courses are available."
  • "Enrolling is instant — click Enroll Now and the course appears in My Courses immediately."
  • "Past Questions & Answers include detailed solutions to help you understand each answer."
